studies.title: Effectiveness of the M-sense Migräne app – a randomized controlled study - EMMA Study

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the M-sense Migräne app, as indicated by the title and detailed descriptions in the trial registration. The app is named explicitly and described in the context of the study.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled trial with participants randomly assigned to either the intervention group using the M-sense Migräne app or a control waiting group, which is a defining feature of an RCT.

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions the use of the M-sense app, including both 'M-sense Premium' and 'M-sense Basis', as part of the SMARTGEM project for migraine therapy. This directly matches the digital therapeutic product M-sense Migräne.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled trial, which is an interventional, experimental study that randomly allocates participants to an intervention group and a control group to evaluate the effectiveness of the SMARTGEM app in reducing migraine days.
